verse_text: The circumference shall be eighteen thousand cubits; and the name of the city from the day on which it takes place shall be its name.'

links.context: He who named you: Scripture does not describe a precise naming of Jerusalem; this refers to the renaming described in 5:4 (see Is 60:14; 62:4; [[JER.33:16]]; [[EZK.48:35]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
